summary: WhatsApp Agentic Chatbot backend testing COMPLETE - ALL 18 TESTS PASSED. Tested webhook verification (GET/POST), test-message endpoint with all 4 scenarios (greeting, specific question, unregistered phone, unavailable data), phone matching, chat memory, and parent dashboard. OpenRouter GPT-4o tool calling working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test students
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp agentic chatbot fully tested. Key endpoint for testing: POST /api/whatsapp/test-message. This endpoint processes messages synchronously and returns JSON with {student, is_first_message, response}. The run_agent function uses OpenRouter GPT-4o with function calling for 7 tools: get_student_overview, get_subject_performance, get_recent_tests, get_pending_homework, get_class_rank, get_improvement_tips, get_dashboard_link.

test_message_endpoint.greeting_scenario: PASS - First message greets without data dump, asks what parent wants to know
test_message_endpoint.specific_question: PASS - Uses tools (get_subject_performance) and returns precise data
test_message_endpoint.unregistered_phone: PASS - Returns {error: 'Phone not registered', response: null}
test_message_endpoint.unavailable_data_fees: PASS - Gracefully declines, suggests contacting school
test_message_endpoint.unavailable_data_attendance: PASS - Gracefully declines, suggests contacting school

parent_dashboard.valid_token: PASS - Returns 200 HTML with student data (Overall Average, Class Rank, etc.)

agentic_features_verified.language_detection: VERIFIED - Hindi message gets Hindi response, English gets English
agentic_features_verified.tool_calling: VERIFIED - GPT-4o correctly calls tools like get_subject_performance, get_pending_homework, get_class_rank
agentic_features_verified.student_name_usage: VERIFIED - Always refers to child by name (e.g., *Test Student*)
agentic_features_verified.whatsapp_formatting: VERIFIED - Uses *bold* formatting for key data
agentic_features_verified.dashboard_link_generation: VERIFIED - Dynamic token-based dashboard URLs work

manual_test_results.hindi_language_test: Namaste → Hindi response with स्टूडेंट टू (Student Two)
manual_test_results.hinglish_subject_test: Maths mein kaisa hai → Hinglish response with 81.8% score
manual_test_results.fees_unavailable_test: School fees query → Graceful decline suggesting school contact
manual_test_results.homework_query_test: Pending homework → Returns 5 pending homework in English
manual_test_results.class_rank_test: Class rank query → Returns rank 2 of 3 with 81.8% average
